title: fix(azservicebus): bump SDK to v1.10.0 to fix nil-annotation panic
body:
# PR Title
fix(azservicebus): bump Azure Service Bus SDK to v1.10.0 to fix nil-annotation panic

# PR Body

## What does this PR do?

Bumps `github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-go/sdk/messaging/azservicebus` from **v1.7.1 → v1.10.0** to pull in the fix for Azure/azure-sdk-for-go#24305, which causes a hard panic in the dapr sidecar's Service Bus receiver loop.

## Bug being fixed

In `azservicebus@v1.7.1` (and every release up to and including v1.8.0), `newReceivedMessage` does an unchecked type assertion on two AMQP message annotations:

```go
// sdk/messaging/azservicebus/message.go @ v1.7.1
if partitionKey, ok := amqpMsg.Annotations[partitionKeyAnnotation]; ok {
    msg.PartitionKey = to.Ptr(partitionKey.(string))   // panics if value is nil
}
...
if deadLetterSource, ok := amqpMsg.Annotations[deadLetterSourceAnnotation]; ok {
    msg.DeadLetterSource = to.Ptr(deadLetterSource.(string))   // panics if value is nil
}
```

AMQP permits the key to be present with a nil value (a broker delivering a message with `x-opt-partition-key = null` is well-formed). The unchecked `.(string)` assertion crashes the entire receiver goroutine with:

```
panic: interface conversion: interface {} is nil, not string
   .../azservicebus@v1.7.1/message.go:370
   .../common/component/azure/servicebus/subscription.go:227
```

`Subscription.Connect` exponentially backs off and reconnects (max interval 5 minutes), then re-receives the same poison message, producing a tight crash loop. Real observed cadence in production: a panic every ~5 minutes for hours.

This was fixed upstream in **azservicebus v1.8.1** (Azure/azure-sdk-for-go#24312, 2025-04-08):

```go
- if partitionKey, ok := amqpMsg.Annotations[partitionKeyAnnotation]; ok {
+ if partitionKey, ok := amqpMsg.Annotations[partitionKeyAnnotation]; ok && partitionKey != nil {
- if deadLetterSource, ok := amqpMsg.Annotations[deadLetterSourceAnnotation]; ok {
+ if deadLetterSource, ok := amqpMsg.Annotations[deadLetterSourceAnnotation]; ok && deadLetterSource != nil {
```

`release-1.18` (and every other current branch, including `main`) still pins **v1.7.1**, so every Service Bus pubsub / binding deployment is exposed.

## Why v1.10.0 specifically?

v1.8.1 is the minimum fix, but v1.10.0 is the latest stable and adds several useful fixes / features with no breaking changes:

| Version | Highlights |
|---|---|
| v1.7.2 | Fixed `RenewMessageLock` cancellation hang |
| v1.7.3 | Retry overflow fix |
| v1.7.4 / v1.8.0-beta.2 | Fixed bug where a message could be received but not returned |
| **v1.8.1** | **Fixes Azure/azure-sdk-for-go#24305 (this panic)** |
| v1.8.0 | `ServiceBusClientOptions.CustomEndpoint` |
| v1.9.0 | New `CodeNotFound` error code |
| v1.9.1 | `ReceiveAndDelete` allows `ReceiveMessages` after `Close` for cached messages |
| v1.10.0 | Settle / renew message locks using only a lock token |

I'm happy to drop this to a minimum bump (v1.8.1) if maintainers prefer; the diff is essentially identical.

## Transitive bumps pulled in by `go mod tidy`

| Module | From | To |
|---|---|---|
| `azure-sdk-for-go/sdk/messaging/azservicebus` | 1.7.1 | **1.10.0** |
| `azure-sdk-for-go/sdk/azcore` | 1.11.1 | 1.18.2 |
| `azure-sdk-for-go/sdk/azidentity` | 1.7.0 | 1.11.0 |
| `azure-sdk-for-go/sdk/internal` | 1.8.0 | 1.11.2 |
| `Azure/go-amqp` | 1.0.5 | 1.4.0 |
| `AzureAD/microsoft-authentication-library-for-go` | 1.2.2 | 1.4.2 |
| `golang-jwt/jwt/v5` | 5.2.2 | 5.3.0 |

## Validation

Locally on the resulting tree:

```bash
go build ./common/component/azure/servicebus/... \
         ./pubsub/azure/servicebus/... \
         ./bindings/azure/servicebusqueues/...
# (clean)

go test  -count=1 -timeout=60s \
         ./common/component/azure/servicebus/... \
         ./pubsub/azure/servicebus/...
# ok    common/component/azure/servicebus    0.017s
# ok    pubsub/azure/servicebus/topics        1.180s

go build $(go list ./... | grep -iE "azure|cosmos|keyvault|eventhub|blob|table|queue")
# (clean across all azure-related packages — validates azcore/azidentity bump)
```

## Notes for maintainers

* PR is intentionally raised against `release-1.18` (latest release) because production sidecars on 1.18.x are panicking now. The same patch applies cleanly to `main`, `release-1.17`, `release-1.16`, `release-1.15`, `release-1.14` — all still pin azservicebus v1.7.1. Happy to open backports / a `main` PR as follow-ups, or for maintainers to cherry-pick.
* Diff is **2 files changed, 29 insertions(+), 21 deletions(-)** — only `go.mod` / `go.sum`.
* No code changes in any component package.

## Related

* Azure SDK bug: Azure/azure-sdk-for-go#24305
* Azure SDK fix:  Azure/azure-sdk-for-go#24312
* Affected receiver code path: `common/component/azure/servicebus/subscription.go:227` (`receiver.ReceiveMessages(...)`)
